groups.name: Baoyu public repo skills
groups.source_evidence: Imported SKILL.md files include homepage metadata pointing to sections inside the public JimLiu/baoyu-skills repository.
groups.license_evidence: Observed in the public repository README License section on GitHub.
groups.notes: Operator confirmed that this export uses the GitHub repository as the source basis, so repo-level license handling is used here instead of ClawHub registry release terms.

groups.name: Baoyu inferred family extensions
groups.source_evidence: These skills share the baoyu family naming and are referenced by neighboring imported baoyu skills, but the current staged copy does not include direct homepage metadata for them.
groups.license_evidence: Candidate repo-level license evidence comes from the public JimLiu/baoyu-skills README License section.
groups.notes: Operator confirmed that these imported skills were sourced from the same GitHub repository at repo level, even though the staged copy does not carry direct per-skill homepage metadata.

groups.name: Baoyu public repo packages
groups.source_evidence: The public JimLiu/baoyu-skills repository has a packages/ directory listing baoyu-md and baoyu-chrome-cdp as package folders.
groups.license_evidence: Only repo-level MIT evidence is currently confirmed; the vendored local package.json files do not carry their own license fields.
groups.notes: Operator confirmed that these vendored units are accepted under the same GitHub repo-level source and license basis for this export.
